emails.subject: Re: Faulty Water Cooler
emails.body: A.A Sir, In response to the a/m subject and trailing mail, it is submitted that if procurement of new water cooler has not approved by worthy finance Director then is it possible to provide the campus some 2nd hand water cooler with good working condition or can you provide us back one of the 3 x faulty water coolers which were sent back to head office from the campus after repair beacuse campus badly needs 1 x water cooler to be installed at the boys side after installation of water RO Plant.Your positive response will be highly appreciated.Kind Regards,Tahir Munir,Principal,SKT-1

emails.subject: Completion of Admission Data on ERP
emails.body: Reminder - IIRespected Principal,ٱلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكُمْThis is to remind you that the admission data on ERP is still incomplete in most of the campuses. This delay is causing discrepancies in student records and affecting the accuracy of our system-wide reporting. As already communicated, it is mandatory to ensure that the following information is completely entered and verified in the ERP:1. Student Picture2. Complete Bio Data (Personal Profile)3. Academic Profile (Matric Marks)4. Parents/Guardians Contact Information5. Co-curricular Details6. Checklist of Documents attachedAll campuses are expected to ensure 100% data completion without further delay. Non-compliance may be reflected in your campus’s performance evaluation and reported to the concerned authorities.RegardsDr. Qaiser MaqsoodKIPS College DirectorateMobile: 0346-0036477Ext. 112

emails.subject: Completion of Admission Data on ERP
emails.body: Reminder - IIRespected Principal,ٱلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكُمْThis is to remind you that the admission data on ERP is still incomplete in most of the campuses. This delay is causing discrepancies in student records and affecting the accuracy of our system-wide reporting. As already communicated, it is mandatory to ensure that the following information is completely entered and verified in the ERP:1. Student Picture2. Complete Bio Data (Personal Profile)3. Academic Profile (Matric Marks)4. Parents/Guardians Contact Information5. Co-curricular Details6. Checklist of Documents attachedAll campuses are expected to ensure 100% data completion without further delay. Non-compliance may be reflected in your campus’s performance evaluation and reported to the concerned authorities.RegardsDr. Qaiser MaqsoodKIPS College DirectorateMobile: 0346-0036477Ext. 112

emails.subject: RE: KIPS R&T Matric 2025-26 - Parents Orientation / Seminar – Revised Schedule and Venue
emails.body: Dear Campus Heads,With reference to subject and trailing email, please note that the Parents Orientation / Seminar (KIPS Revision and Test Session Matric 2025-26), which was earlier scheduled to be held on November 7, 2025, at the campuses of KIPS Evening Coaching, will now be conducted on November 15, 2025, as a seminar titled: “Understanding of New Syllabus and Exam Methodology (Matric) – Success Key KIPS R&T Session” You are requested to take note of the revised schedule: 📅 Date: Saturday, November 15, 2025🕙 Time: 10:00 AM – 12:00 Noon📍 Venue: Faisal Auditorium, Gate No. 3, Punjab University, Lahore.📍 Location Map: https://maps.app.goo.gl/KsZS2A57GMEqAjdSA Make announcements in classes to invite parents and students and ensure maximum presence. Presence of following staff is mandatory:Campus Heads (all campuses)ACM / ADMIN / BEIStudent Care OfficersInformation Officers. Reporting time for above mentioned staff members is 09:00 AM.Dress Code shall be formal. Information officers must wear a tie. Casual dressing is strictly prohibited. Best Regards, Muhammad Abbas MushtaqRegional Manager, LahoreEmail: preps.rmlhr@kips.edu.pkPhone: 3361040376Mobile: 03450384000KIPS Corporate Office5/6 D block Johar town Lahore

Presence of following staff is mandatory:Campus Heads (all campuses)ACM / ADMIN / BEIStudent Care OfficersInformation Officers. Reporting time for above mentioned staff members is 09:00 AM.Dress Code shall be formal. Information officers must wear a tie. Casual dressing is strictly prohibited. emails.subject: Undergraduate Universities Admissions 2025.
emails.body: Dear KIPS Family,Hope you are doing well. emails.subject: KIPS R&T Matric 2025-26 - Parents Orientation / Seminar – Revised Schedule and Venue
emails.body: Dear Heads, Kindly note that the Parents Orientation / Seminar (KIPS Revision and Test Session Matric 2025-26), which was earlier scheduled to be held on November 7, 2025, at the campuses of KIPS Evening Coaching, will now be conducted on November 15, 2025, as a seminar titled: “Understanding of New Syllabus and Exam Methodology (Matric) – Success Key KIPS R&T Session” Objectives of Seminar: Understanding ALP syllabus for 9th Class.Focus on core concepts of reduced syllabus and pairing schemes for exams.Understanding of revised syllabus and exam methodology for 10th Class.How to cope up the challenges of students: Time management and revision.Understanding of KIPS Teaching Methodology in revision and test session. You are requested to take note of the revised schedule and proceed as per your respective departmental responsibilities accordingly. 📅 Date: Saturday, November 15, 2025🕙 Time: 10:00 AM – 12:00 Noon📍 Venue: Faisal Auditorium, Gate No. 3, Punjab University, Lahore📍 Location Map: https://maps.app.goo.gl/KsZS2A57GMEqAjdSADepartmental Responsibilities Marketing DepartmentMarketing Materials: Dropdown Banner, Standees, Media Wall, 1,500 Leaflets, Social Media Post, and E-Invitation for Parents, BODs, and Department Heads.SMD with sound system.Event coverage (photography and short video clips).Mainstream media coverage. Kindly share artwork on priority basis for review and approval. NDC DepartmentKDP display & sale stalls (Matric & Intermediate) — minimum of two.PNM DepartmentProvision of:6 Tables12 Cane ChairsFor establishment of the Information / Admission Desk.Campus ManagementEnsure the presence of Campus Heads, ACM/BEI, SCO, and Information Officers.Make announcements in classes to invite parents and students.HR / Admin DepartmentEnsure the presence of an HR Representative.Deployment of 3 Office Boys. Best Regards, Muhammad Abbas MushtaqRegional Manager, LahoreEmail: preps.rmlhr@kips.edu.pkPhone: 3361040376Mobile: 03450384000KIPS Corporate Office5/6 D bl…
